bodyText: MiniMax 2.7 & Kimi K2.5 are free on Zo Zo · Pricing About Newsletter Blog Resources Download Get started Product Updates Office Hours Blog Documentation ALL FEATURED Week of Mar 22, 2026 AUTOMATE Agents tab renamed to Automations. UX Skills hub now supports sorting by newest and oldest, and shows Update vs Install for skills already on disk. UX You can now edit multiple secrets at once from Settings. Week of Mar 15, 2026 AI Upgraded image generation to Gemini 3.1 Flash. BUILD zo.space routes now have version history — undo and redo changes to any route. BUILD Added a restart space server tool to help Zo recover from broken zo.space builds. UX Skills hub now sorts by popularity by default, with options for A–Z and undiscovered. CONNECT Telegram /model picker now includes your BYOK models. UX Fixed toasts being undismissable in the desktop app. UX Improved chat scrolling — removed auto-follow during streaming and restored correct scroll-to-bottom on send. AI Added MiniMax M2.7 model. UX You can now disable AI credit spending from Billing — BYOK and free models remain available. UX Conversation titles are now generated in your preferred language. CONNECT Telegram integration improvements – chat with Zo from Telegram with threading, slash commands (/model, /persona, /status, /help), and a pairing-code connection flow. AI Added GPT-5.4 Mini model. AI Fixed model selector incorrectly defaulting to GPT-5.3 Codex for some users. UX Fixed authentication for users with non-ASCII characters in their names. AI GLM-5 is now available on the Free plan. CONNECT The desktop app now bundles agent-browser for all platforms for browser automation on your local device (beta in Settings > Advanced). AUTOMATE Fixed dropdowns not being clickable when editing agent schedules. Week of Mar 8, 2026 AUTOMATE Scheduled tasks with SMS delivery now work for users with iMessage-only phone numbers. BUILD You can now change the visibility of your zo.space homepage. BUILD Shared zo.space links now shows a unique, handle-branded preview image. AI Added Gemini CLI as an AI provider. AI Added Sonnet 4.6 model and renamed Claude Code provider to Claude Agent. UX Improved VoiceOver accessibility in the text editor on macOS and iOS. Week of Mar 1, 2026 UX Right-click empty space in the file tree to create new files, folders, notes, or sites — same options as the + menu. UX Theme and appearance preferences now sync across devices — your chosen theme persists everywhere you use Zo. UX Personalize Zo with location and social profiles CONNECT Fixed MCP tool calls failing when external clients sent string arguments instead of objects. BUILD Improved link previews when sharing zo.space pages — pages now include proper Open Graph and Twitter Card metadata. AI Added GPT-5.4 model. AI Fixed Azure Foundry BYOK not working correctly with Anthropic models. POWER Fixed X search failing when date filters were provided. AUTOMATE Scheduled agents now show error markers and notify you when a run fails. UX New desktop app loading screen with animated cloud background. UX Sharing your Zo Computer link now shows your handle in the preview instead of generic text. UX Fixed file mention badges on mobile not opening the file. UX Improved desktop file sync reliability — sync now recovers from setup interruptions and retries more gracefully. Week of Feb 22, 2026 UX Buy Zo merch (sweaters and keychains) from the Fan Club page. AI Added Codex 5.3 model. AI Added Azure Foundry as a bring-your-own-key provider. AUTOMATE Telegram is now available as a delivery method for scheduled agents. CHAT Stream errors now show inline with a Retry button to re-send your last message. CONNECT The /zo/ask API now accepts a persona_id parameter. BUILD zo.space preview now shows whether each route is public or private. BUILD zo.space pages show a friendly status page when your computer is sleeping instead of a generic error. UX Persona editor now shows a character count and warns when approaching the limit. BUILD Added a Restart button to the hosted services panel. AI Fixed BYOK Anthropic and Google models not using correct max token settings. UX Fixed file search issue that was returning no results for some workspaces. POWER Zo's browser now properly saves session cookies across tool calls. CHAT Improved chat streaming reliability – Zo now recovers from malformed data chunks and shows a toast on stream errors. CHAT Duplicate or fork a chat from the chat tab context menu. BUILD Agent can undo and redo changes to zo.space. AI Zo now reads SOUL.md files alongside AGENTS.md for personality and tone guidance. AI MiniMax M2.5 is now the default Fast model. BUILD Hosted services now automatically restart when you update them, and the service doctor detects stale code. Week of Feb 15, 2026 UX Added a visual JSON editor for .json files. UX Reorganized left rail – Hosting, Datasets, System, Terminal, and Billing are now in a collapsible More section. AI Added Google as a bring-your-own-key provider. UX You can now opt out of Discord Rich Presence in the desktop app. AI Free models are now available with a redesigned model selector – no more Fast/Smart aliases, just pick from featured free models. CONNECT The /zo/ask API endpoint now supports model_name="auto" to let Zo choose the best model. UX Fixed native browser auto-fill appearing on some input fields where it wasn't wanted. AI Added GLM-5 and MiniMax M2.5. CONNECT Discord Rich Presence – Zo now shows up in Discord when using the desktop app. UX Middle-click to close chat tabs. CONNECT Longer-running SMS tasks now complete in the background – you'll get an initial acknowledgment, then the final result when it's ready. CONNECT Choose which model and persona Zo uses when responding via SMS, email, and Telegram. Week of Feb 8, 2026 UX Improved Skills tab with friendlier copy and descriptions. CONNECT Use Telegram to chat with Zo. UX Fixed select-all (cmd + a) and other keyboard shortcuts in the desktop app text fields. UX Bio character limit increased to 2048 characters. UX The terminal is now a tab instead of a panel – use alt + ~ (backtick) to toggle it. Week of Feb 1, 2026 AI Added Claude Opus 4.6 – now the default Smart model choice. UX Added a Refresh button to Zo's browser to reload the current session. AI Added Kimi K2.5 (now the default Fast model choice). AI Added GPT 5.2 Codex model. POWER Attach files when sending emails to yourself using Zo's email tool. UX File browser now defaults to showing only the Name column. BUILD Create sites with selective template copying – choose which directories to include when using a template. UX Move files using the file actions menu (...). Week of Jan 25, 2026 UX Settings reorganized for easier navigation. BUILD Create site tool response UI opens the site preview when clicked. UX Added consistent tooltips and descriptions throughout the interface. UX Fixed hero text cutoff on mobile. Week of Jan 18, 2026 UX A new Skills tab to browse, edit, and create agent skills. UX Bookmark files and folders from anywhere using the kebab (...) menu in the file tree, directory view, or file header. UX Bookmarked files now show their file path in the Bookmarks dialog and Files Locations panel. UX Creating a site now automatically opens the site and starts a new chat to help you build. BUILD Site logs are now chronologically sorted across all sources with toggle buttons to filter by server, browser, or network logs. POWER Improvements to Skills loading in Zo agent. UX Browse folders in grid view with file previews. UX Use the file header kebab (...) menu to rename or download files. UX Mentioned file previews work for files saved in your conversation workspace. UX See Product Updates right in Zo – there's now an Updates panel in the home footer. POWER Paste a URL by itself and Zo will save the webpage with its built-in web clipper. UX Trash is now hidden by default when Zo browses and searches files. AUTOMATE Choose your notification method (email, SMS, or none) when creating scheduled tasks. Choose none to prompt Zo to conditionally notify you. UX Copy, paste, and select-all now work in the terminal on Windows and desktop apps. CHAT Improved file attachments in the chat. Drag and drop files into the chat, or click the Plus button to select from recent files, or upload from your computer. AUTOMATE Scheduled tasks now inherit your active persona when created. CHAT More chat tab keyboard shortcuts – use alt + ctrl + 1-9 to switch tabs, and alt + ctrl + [ or alt + ctrl + ] to move between them. Remember, you can use alt + 1-9 and alt + [ or alt + ] to navigate non-chat tabs. CHAT An "All Chats" tab in the conversation list to see every conversation across all tabs. UX Locations panel in the Files tab – quickly access your bookmarked and recent files. AI New "Fast" and "Smart" model choices – these will always be set to our current recommended models with the optimal balance of quality, cost, and speed. AI Models that don't support vision (like GLM 4.7) receive helpful text descriptions when they encounter images, and don't fail. AI Added GLM 4.7 Flash model. CONNECT MCP server – connect Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini CLI, Codex, and other MCP clients to your Zo so they can access your files, connected apps, and Power. CONNECT Zo's browser now detects which sites you're logged into and shows them in Settings. CONNECT Skills – packaged, reusable workflows you can create, share, and run. Create a new skill from the command palette. UX Add new and help commands you can use when texting Zo to start a new conversation or view options. AI Reduced Zo's token usage. POWER Add a new tool to find similar links to a given URL. AI Add new GPT 5.2 Pro model. Week of Jan 11, 2026 AI Models that don't support images fail gracefully when encountering image outputs. UX An improved interface for managing sites and services. AI An improved interface for adding external LLM providers. CHAT Use alt + t (Option on Mac) to open a new chat tab. UX An improved greeting on the homepage that displays structured suggestions. AI Zo now supports AGENTS.md files. CONNECT Add Microsoft OneDrive integration. Import files from your OneDrive into Zo, or work with your OneDrive agentically using AI. POWER Zo can now take actions in Zo's browser (clicking, scrolling, typing, etc). BUILD Connect a Stripe account to Zo to sell products and services. BUILD Use custom domains for published sites and services hosted on your Zo. AI Added default "Fast" and "Smart" model choices – always set to our current recommended models. Week of Jan 4, 2026 CONNECT Zo API – programmatic access to Zo's capabilities. SHARE Gift AI credits to friends and colleagues. POWER Web research can now search for people, powered by Exa. CONNECT Browser Connect improvements – easier to sign into common sites (full browser use coming soon). AUTOMATE Agents page enhancements – group by notification mode, more details in agent list. UX Billing page enhancements – view past invoice history and credit grant details. BUILD Logs panel for Zo sites – debug and monitor your hosted apps. UX Language preference in Settings – have Zo respond in your preferred language. CONNECT Register multiple SMS numbers in Settings, so multiple phone numbers can receive texts from your Zo. CHAT Parallel chats – run multiple conversations simultaneously. BUILD Datasets – import data from Spotify, Amazon, Twitter, or any other source for AI-powered analysis. Week of Dec 14, 2025 AI Added GPT 5.2 model. BUILD New site templates (Blog, Event Registration, Presentation, Data Dashboard, Marketing Page). CONNECT iMessage and international phone number support when texting Zo. UX Fixed display of EPUB files. AI Reduced token usage with context and caching optimizations. AI Top-up AI credits, and configure automatic top-up rules. AI Bring your own API keys to use LLM services of your choice, alongside Zo's built-in models. UX View and manage keybindings in Settings > Advanced. UX New full-width file browser. UX Start button with new actions for common tasks. Week of Nov 30, 2025 AI Added DeepSeek v3.2 model. AI Added the ability to top up account credits from billing settings. SHARE You can now share prompts publicly. UX Sync your files between your computer and Zo with the desktop app. UX Windows desktop app is now available to download. Week of Nov 23, 2025 POWER Increased the time limit when viewing Zo's browser from 5m to 10m. POWER When Zo uses the view webpage tool, the screenshot is now saved to Zo's workspace. UX Added syntax highlighting for .jsonl files. AI Upgraded image generation to Gemini 3 Pro Image. AI Upgraded Gemini models to Gemini 3 Pro. AI Upgraded Grok models to Grok 4.1 Fast. AI Upgraded GPT-5 to GPT-5.1. AI Upgraded Opus 4.1 to Opus 4.5. UX You can rename files more easily from the filename in the header. UX Notes can be created without a name (defaults to Untitled, Untitled 2, etc). UX You can sign up with any email (previously required a Google account). UX Zo's browser now opens in a tab. UX Terminal sessions now persist across refreshes. POWER Upgraded the research web tool to use the new Exa Fast search API. Week of Nov 16, 2025 LAUNCH We launched Zo Computer – X, LinkedIn, ProductHunt, Cerebral Valley.
